title: GST/HST rebate – Remission order - Canada.ca
content:
## GST/HST rebate – Remission order
Form GST189 – Reason code 20
Reason code 20 provides a GST/HST rebate to which you may be entitled as a result of a remission order granted under the Financial Administration Act .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
